what_changed: Added RangeBatchReader.read_many and batch range reads for memory, disk, Unity Catalog, and routed readers.
Updated ChunkCache and KVMaterializer to batch cold materialization while preserving sequential cache-tier accounting.
Exposed RangeBatchReader through document_kv_cache and restaurant_kv_serving facades and documented the materialization behavior.
